name: StandaloneConfigOpen
title: StandaloneConfigOpen
syntax: dword StandaloneConfigOpen(CHAR rtcfgFileName[], dword stopCurrentMeasurement, dword startNewMeasurement, dword returnToActiveConfig)
description: Opens the RTCFG file with the given name as standalone configuration.

parameters.name: rtcfgFileName
parameters.description: Name of the standalone configuration file (without path) to be set as default file.

parameters.name: stopCurrentMeasurement
parameters.description: If this parameter is 1 measurement is stopped immediately (but still waiting for deferred stop clients). If the parameter value is 0 the request to load another configuration is queued until end of measurement.

parameters.name: startNewMeasurement
parameters.description: If this parameter is set to 1 measurement will start immediately after the new configuration has been loaded.

parameters.name: returnToActiveConfig
parameters.description: If this parameter is set to 1 the default configuration (usually a sort of “master configuration”) will be loaded automatically after measurement based on the new configuration will have been stopped.

return: The function returns an error code with 0 representing successful operation.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
